name: RelayClaw
description: Structured agent handoff and context bridge for OpenClaw crews. Schema-validated state transfer, heartbeat dead-drop recovery, human approval gate, FIFO queue, conflict resolution, schema versioning, and per-chain cost ledger.

supabaseServiceKey.description: Supabase service_role key. Required — plugin uses service_role for all operations.

heartbeatIntervalMs.description: How often (ms) the heartbeat service snapshots agent state. Default: 30000

deadDropThresholdMs.description: How long (ms) after the last heartbeat before the dead-drop monitor promotes the snapshot to an interrupted handoff. Default: 90000

mdExportDir.description: Absolute path where .md handoff exports are written. Default: ~/.openclaw/relayclaw/handoffs/

notifyTarget.description: Default Telegram chat ID for approval notifications.

notifyGroupId.description: Mission Control group ID for topic-routed notifications.

autoApproveHighTrust.description: Auto-approve handoffs from agents with trust_level='high'. Default: true
